{{Quote|The latest reports have slave barracks all over Colony One. They're constructing palaces for the leaders of the Peace Brigade, and a building to house their Senate.|[[Kyp Durron]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Ylesia">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''</ref>}}
The '''Palace of Peace''' was the main headquarters of the [[Peace Brigade]] in [[Peace City]] on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], and was also the meeting place of the [[Ylesian Senate]]. The flayed skin of a large [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] decorated the outside. It was destroyed in the [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|battle of Ylesia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''
